messages.content: We need to break up this Sigil flood specification into a Sigil hierarchy. Help me do that.

Yes. Start with a root sigil that speaks only in the broadest language of the product, then let each contained sigil hold one coherent concern with no more than five siblings.

A good first cut is Sigil containing Vision, Language, Structure, Interface, and Machinery. Vision holds purpose and drift control, Language holds the domain concepts like sigils, containment, sibling references, entanglements, and attention, Structure holds file system and persistence shape, Interface holds screen layout, navigation, settings, export, and multi-window behavior, and Machinery holds the Tauri, React, Rust, AI, and distribution implementation story.

If you want, I can turn that into a full tree down to second or third level with names and one-sentence language for each context.
